title_2: Mai Ɗaukar Hoton allo akan layi: Babu Rajista da Babu Alama ta Ruwa
notAvailable: Sigar wayar hannu ba ta nan
notAvailable_description: ScreenXRecorder bai yi aiki akan wayar hannu ba tukuna. Buɗe shi akan kwamfutarka don fara ɗaukar hoto.
initialConfig: Zaɓa abin da kake son kama:
title_3: ScreenXRecorder: Kyautan mai ɗaukar hoton allo akan layi, ba tare da rajista ko alama ta ruwa ba
description_3:
ScreenXRecorder wani kayan aiki ne na kyauta don ɗaukar hoton allo wanda ke aiki kai tsaye a cikin mai binciken ku — babu abin da za a girka, babu asusun da ake buƙata. Ɗauki hoton allon ku gaba ɗaya, wani taga na musamman, ko shafin mai bincike kawai, kuma ƙara sauti daga makirofon ko bidiyo daga kyamaran rediyo gwargwadon buƙata.

Sabanin yawancin kayan aikin ɗaukar hoto, yana kasancewa mai sauƙi: ka ɗauki hoto, ka sauke, ka gama. Babu saitin gyarawa, babu alamun ruwa, babu ƙarin matakai. Fayil ɗin bidiyo mai tsabta kawai da aka adana a kan na'urar ku.

Duk ɗaukar hoton yana faruwa a cikin mai binciken ku na gida. Babu abin da ke ɗaukewa zuwa wani sabar, don haka hotunanka suna kasancewa masu sirri gaba ɗaya — kyau ga taron da ke da hankali, gabatarwar asiri, ko abubuwan sirri da ba kwa son adana su a gajimare.

Yana daidaituwa da Windows, macOS da Linux. An gina shi don malamai waɗanda ke ƙirƙira darussan bidiyo, masu haɓakawa waɗanda ke rubuta rahotannin kura-kurai, masu ƙirƙira abubuwa waɗanda ke yin jagora, ma'aikata masu nisa waɗanda ke rubuta hanyoyin aiki, da kowa waɗanda ke buƙatar kama allo masu inganci ba tare da wahala ba.
title_4: Sarrafa makirofon yayin ɗaukar hoton allo
description_4:
Bayan ɗaukar hoto ya fara, makirofon yana kasancewa aiki — amma zaka iya ɓuɓɓuge shi da danna sau ɗaya kuma gyara ƙarfin shigarwa a kowane lokaci a lokacin zaman. Yana da amfani idan kuna so ku bayyana sassa na musamman kawai, ko idan ana samun sauti na baya. Sarrafawar sauti koyaushe tana bayyane.

Madaurin ƙarfi yana baka damar saita matakin sauti daidai kafin ko yayin ɗaukar hoto. Rage shi yana rage kama hayaniyar muhalli; ƙara shi yana taimakawa idan kuna magana a hankali. Gyara ba tare da ƙoƙarin dakatar da ko sake fara ɗaukar hoto ba.
title_5: Ɗauki sauti da bidiyo lokaci ɗaya: sanya kyamara a ko'ina a kan allo
description_5:
Kunna kyamaran rediyo yana ƙara layin Hoto cikin Hoto ga ɗaukar hotona ku. Ja shi zuwa wani kusurwa ko gefen allo kuma sake saka shi a kowane lokaci da kuke so — ko da lokacin ɗaukar hoto. Wannan shi ne tsarin iri ɗaya da kuka gani a cikin jagora da rediyo: fuskar ku tana bayyane yayin da abun ciki yana kunna a bayan.

Yana aiki da kyau don nuna shirye-shirye, darussa akan layi, bidiyo mai bayani, ko kowane ɗaukar hoto inda mai gabatarwa ya kamata ya kasance bayyane. Sanya kyamara ta yadda ba za ta toshe abubuwan da ke da mahimmanci ba.
title_6: Duba, sauke, ko sake ɗaukar hoto: kai ke yanke shawara
description_6:
Lokacin da ka tsaya, takardun gabatarwa yana bayyana kafin a adana komai. Ka kalla, kuma idan yana da kyau, saukar da shi kai tsaye zuwa na'urarka. Idan wani abu ya yi kuskure, danna sau ɗaya yana sake saita zaman kuma kuna fara sake. Babu sarrafa fayil, babu ɗaukewa, babu jira.

Ana sauke fayil ɗin a cikin tsarin WebM wanda ke aiki a cikin yawancin kunna bidiyo kuma manyan dandamalin gyarawa da raba suna karɓar shi ba tare da canza ba. Shirye don amfani kai tsaye daga mai bincike.
dialogReturn: Shin kuna tabbata kuna son fita? Ɗaukar hotona yanzu za ta ɓace.
compatibility: Masu bincike da aka goyi baya: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Opera da Safari.
dialogScreenCapture: Kashe wannan zai zama ɗan sabani, ko ba haka ba? Mai ɗaukar hoton allo yana buƙatar allo.
dialogPictureInPicture: Jan kyamara zuwa inda ta fi dacewa a allon ku. Zaka iya matarsa a kowane lokaci, ko da yayin ɗaukar hoto.
dialogPictureInPictureAltImg: Nuni mai motsi yana nuna layin kyamaran rediyo ana jan shi zuwa wurare daban-daban yayin ɗaukar hoto
dialogInfoUseMicrophone: Ba za ku iya canza makirofon yayin ɗaukar hoto ba, amma zaku iya ɓuɓɓuge shi da daidaita ƙarfin shigarwa a kowane lokaci.
dialogInfoUseMicrophoneAltImg: Nuni mai motsi na maɓallin ɓuɓɓuge makirofon da madaurin ƙarfi yayin ɗaukar hoto
step1Screen: Mataki na 1: Zaɓi wanne allo, taga, ko shafi kake son kama.
